entries.value: Umtapo wezifundo uqina kakhulu lapho umbuzo wosesho uhambisana nekhono, isihloko, noma izinga elaziwayo.

entries.source: A Khan Academy alternative for live AI learning moments.
entries.value: Okunye kwe-Khan Academy kwezikhathi zokufunda nge-AI ezibukhoma.

entries.source: A learner choosing between tools usually needs one of three things: a structured curriculum, a live tutor for the stuck point, or a practice loop that makes the idea stay learned.
entries.value: Umfundi okhetha phakathi kwamathuluzi uvame ukudinga enye yezinto ezintathu: ikharikhulamu ehlelekile, uthisha obukhoma lapho ebambeke khona, noma umjikelezo wokuzijwayeza owenza umqondo uhlale ufundiwe.

entries.source: A learner often moves through prepared videos, articles, exercises, and dashboards.
entries.value: Umfundi uvame ukudlula kumavidiyo alungiselelwe, izihloko, izivivinyo, namadeshibhodi.

entries.source: A learner starts inside a mode-specific chat and can ask for a simpler model, a harder question, a quiz, a flashcard deck, or a critique.
entries.value: Umfundi uqala ngaphakathi kwengxoxo ekhethekile yemodi futhi angacela imodeli elula, umbuzo onzima, i-quiz, iqoqo lamakhadi okufunda, noma ukugxekwa.

Do not ask which product wins. Ask which learning behavior fits.

entries.source: Do the comparison pages include private user chats?

entries.source: Does this comparison include private user chats?
entries.value: Ingabe lokhu kuqhathanisa kufaka izingxoxo zangasese zabasebenzisi?

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: Ukuqhathanisa ngakunye kubhalelwa ukuba nobulungiswa, kube wusizo, futhi kugxile esenzweni: ithuluzi elaziwayo lihle kuphi, i-inspir ihluke kuphi, nokuthi iyiphi imodi yomphakathi okufanele ivulwe kuqala.

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Ikhasi ngalinye lixhumanisa inhloso yokuqhathanisa nezindlela ezibukhoma, imihlahlandlela, imiyalo, namafayela okutholwa afundeka yi-AI.

entries.source: Every link here is public and crawlable. Private user chats stay out of comparison, sitemap, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Zonke izixhumanisi lapha zingezomphakathi futhi zingacacela abakhasa. Izingxoxo zangasese zabasebenzisi zihlala ngaphandle kokuqhathanisa, i-sitemap, namafayela okutholwa afundeka yi-AI.

entries.source: External facts are linked to official sources.
Fair comparisons help learners choose faster.
entries.value: Ukuqhathanisa okunobulungiswa kusiza abafundi bakhethe ngokushesha.

entries.source: Home
Homework behavior
Homework Coach and Math Step Coach are tuned for hint-first support, step checks, and ownership of the final answer.
entries.value: I-Homework Coach ne-Math Step Coach zilungiselelwe ukwesekwa okuqala ngeseluleko, ukuhlolwa kwezinyathelo, nobunikazi bempendulo yokugcina.

I need homework help without cheating.
entries.value: Ngidinga usizo lomsebenzi wasekhaya ngaphandle kokukhohlisa.

entries.source: I need to remember this for an exam.
I want history to feel alive but still evidence-aware.
entries.value: Ngifuna umlando uzwakale uphila kodwa usaqaphela ubufakazi.

entries.source: I watched a lesson but still do not get it.
inspir comparison pages should be useful without pretending another platform is static. Check official sources for the latest product details.
entries.value: Amakhasi okuqhathanisa e-inspir kufanele abe wusizo ngaphandle kokuzenza sengathi enye inkundla imile. Hlola imithombo esemthethweni ukuze uthole imininingwane yakamuva yomkhiqizo.

entries.source: inspir is built around public guest AI modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, math steps, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir yakhelwe ezindleleni zomphakathi ze-AI zezivakashi: imibuzo ye-Socratic, izeluleko zomsebenzi wasekhaya, izinyathelo ze-math, impendulo yokubhala, ama-quiz, amakhadi okufunda, nokuhlela ukutadisha.

entries.source: Interaction style
Is inspir a replacement for Khan Academy?
entries.value: Ingabe i-inspir ithatha indawo ye-Khan Academy?

entries.value: okunye esikhundleni sothisha we-AI we-Khan Academy

entries.source: Khan Academy alternative
Khan Academy Alternative for Live AI Tutoring
entries.value: Okunye Esikhundleni se-Khan Academy Sokufundisa nge-AI Okubukhoma

entries.source: Khan Academy is built around a broad library of lessons, practice, standards-aligned content, and mastery support.
entries.value: I-Khan Academy yakhelwe umtapo obanzi wezifundo, ukuzijwayeza, okuqukethwe okuhambisana namazinga, nokusekelwa kobungcweti.

entries.source: Khan Academy is excellent for structured lessons and practice. inspir is built for the moment a learner needs a live, promptable AI mode that can respond to their exact question, draft, problem, argument, or study plan.
entries.value: I-Khan Academy ihle kakhulu ezifundweni ezihlelekile nokuzijwayeza. I-inspir yakhelwe umzuzu lapho umfundi edinga imodi ye-AI ebukhoma, engayalelwa, engaphendula umbuzo wakhe oqondile, umbhalo wokuqala, inkinga, impikiswano, noma uhlelo lokutadisha.

entries.source: Khanmigo official page
Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: Abafundi bavame ukusesha ngomkhiqizo asebewazi. Impendulo ewusizo ayikho kokuthi onqobayo uthatha konke; isekutheni yikuphi ukuziphatha kwethuluzi okufanele umsebenzi.

entries.source: Learners who have a specific question and need help now.
entries.value: Abafundi abanombuzo othile futhi abadinga usizo manje.

entries.source: Learning shape
Learning workflow
Live help
Live modes, guides, and workflows related to this comparison.
entries.value: Izindlela ezibukhoma, imihlahlandlela, nokugeleza kwemisebenzi okuhlobene nalokhu kuqhathanisa.

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.
entries.value: Abafundi abaningi basesha ngokuhlanganisa amathuluzi asebewazi. Ikhasi lokuqhathanisa elicacile libasiza bakhethe ukuziphatha kokufunda okufanele ngaphandle kokufihla ukuhwebelana.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: Cha. Ukuqhathanisa kuxhumanisa kuphela nezindawo zokungena zemodi yesivakashi yomphakathi, imihlahlandlela, imitapo yemiyalo, nezindlela zokufunda. Izingxoxo zangasese ezigciniwe azisetshenziswa njengokuqukethwe komthombo.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: Cha. Amakhasi okuqhathanisa abhalelwe ukubonisa ukuthi nini i-inspir iyichofozi lokuqala elingcono lokufundisa nge-AI okubukhoma, imiyalo, nezindlela zokufunda zezivakashi, nokuthi nini ikharikhulamu ehlelekile noma umtapo wezifundo osemthethweni usengaba wusizo.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Cha. Axhumanisa kuphela namakhasi omphakathi, izindlela zezivakashi zomphakathi, imihlahlandlela, imiyalo, nezindlela zokufunda. Izingxoxo zangasese ezigciniwe zihlala ngaphandle kwezindawo zokutholwa.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Hhayi kuzo zonke izidingo zokufunda. I-Khan Academy iwusizo ezifundweni ezihlelekile nokuzijwayeza. I-inspir iwusizo lapho umfundi edinga usizo lwe-AI olubukhoma, imibuzo ye-Socratic, izeluleko, ama-quiz, amakhadi okufunda, impendulo, noma ukugeleza kokutadisha ngokuzungeze into ayisebenzayo ngqo.

entries.source: Official Khan Academy page for its AI-powered tutor and teaching assistant.
entries.value: Ikhasi elisemthethweni le-Khan Academy lothisha wayo ne-AI enamandla nomsizi wokufundisa.

entries.source: Official mission and subject coverage reference.
Official source
Open Learn Anything, ask for the prerequisite ideas, then switch into Socratic Instruction to test your model.
entries.value: Vula i-Learn Anything, cela imibono edingekayo ngaphambili, bese ushintshela ku-Socratic Instruction ukuhlola imodeli yakho.

entries.source: Open mode
Open source
Open the learning map
Open the mode that matches the job.
Open workflow
Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Namathisela umbuzo, lokho okuzamile, nendawo obambeke kuyo. Cela iseluleko esincane kakhulu esiwusizo, hhayi impendulo yokugcina.

entries.source: People who learn better through conversation, questions, quizzes, and flashcards.
entries.value: Abantu abafunda kangcono ngengxoxo, imibuzo, ama-quiz, namakhadi okufunda.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Izifundo ezilungiselelwe, amavidiyo, nezivivinyo ziqine kakhulu lapho umfundi eyazi ukulandelana kwezihloko.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Izindlela zomphakathi zilungiselelwe izincazelo, imibuzo ye-Socratic, izeluleko, ukuhlolwa kwezinyathelo, ama-quiz, nokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: Ama-URL ezihloko zomphakathi avumela usesho olufana ne-AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, kanye ne-talk to historical figures AI ukuthi lufike ngqo emodini ehambisanayo.

entries.source: Read comparison
Read guide
Reference notes
Search intent
Search landing pages
Short answer
Side by side
Socratic AI tutor alternative
Socratic AI tutor for students
Some searches need a course library. Some need a live AI tutor, a hint, a Socratic question, a quiz, or a flashcard deck. These pages make that choice clearer.
entries.value: Olunye usesho ludinga umtapo wezifundo. Olunye ludinga uthisha we-AI obukhoma, iseluleko, umbuzo we-Socratic, i-quiz, noma iqoqo lamakhadi okufunda. La makhasi enza lokho kukhetha kucace kakhudlwana.

entries.source: Start here
Start learning
Structured practice helps build foundations before and after homework.
entries.value: Ukuzijwayeza okuhlelekile kusiza ukwakha izisekelo ngaphambi nangemva komsebenzi wasekhaya.

entries.source: Students who want hints or step checks without answer-copying.
entries.value: Abafundi abafuna izeluleko noma ukuhlolwa kwezinyathelo ngaphandle kokukopisha izimpendulo.

entries.source: Teachers or parents evaluating focused AI learning behaviors before a school deployment.
entries.value: Othisha noma abazali abahlola ukuziphatha kokufunda nge-AI okugxilile ngaphambi kokukhishwa kwesikole.

entries.source: The comparison searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Usesho lokuqhathanisa lesi sikhungo esakhelwe ukuluphendula.

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: Iphuzu akukhona ukuhlanganisa amathuluzi amabili ahlukene abe munye onqobayo. Iphuzu ukuhambisa umsebenzi wokufunda ekuziphatheni okusiza ngokushesha.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
These are the high-intent moments where a learner usually needs a live teaching behavior rather than another broad page.
entries.value: Lezi yizikhathi zenjongo ephezulu lapho umfundi evame ukudinga ukuziphatha kokufundisa okubukhoma kunelinye ikhasi elibanzi.

entries.source: These phrases are surfaced naturally on the page and in structured discovery files so crawlers can understand the exact comparison intent.
entries.value: La mabinzana avela ngokwemvelo ekhasini nasefayeleni lokutholwa elihlelekile ukuze abakhasa baqonde inhloso eqondile yokuqhathanisa.

entries.source: This is not a claim that learners should abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson library and a live AI learning mode work best together: learn the foundation, then use inspir to ask questions, repair confusion, practise recall, or get unstuck.
entries.value: Lokhu akusona isimangalo sokuthi abafundi kufanele balahle i-Khan Academy. Ezihlokweni eziningi, umtapo wezifundo othembekile nemodi yokufunda nge-AI ebukhoma kusebenza kahle ndawonye: funda isisekelo, bese usebenzisa i-inspir ukubuza imibuzo, ukulungisa ukudideka, ukuzijwayeza ukukhumbula, noma ukuphuma lapho ubambekile.

entries.source: Tool comparison
Try the live AI learning path.
Turn the explanation into quiz questions, flashcards, and a review schedule based on what you miss.
entries.value: Guqula incazelo ibe imibuzo ye-quiz, amakhadi okufunda, neshejuli yokubuyekeza esekelwe kokuphuthelwayo.

entries.source: Tutoring
Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Sebenzisa imodi ebukhoma lapho wazi iphuzu eliqondile lokudideka futhi ufuna incazelo elandelayo, umbuzo, iseluleko, noma umjikelezo wokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Sebenzisa isifundo esihlelekile lapho wazi indawo yesifundo futhi ufuna incazelo ehleliwe noma iqoqo lokuzijwayeza.

entries.source: Use cases
Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: Sebenzisa amakhasi okuqhathanisa ukuhambisa usesho esenzweni.

entries.source: Use inspir first when your search is about an action: explain this simply, ask me Socratic questions, give me a homework hint, check my math step, quiz me, build flashcards, debate this topic, or help me plan revision.
entries.value: Sebenzisa inspir kuqala lapho ukusesha kwakho kumayelana nesenzo: chaza lokhu kalula, ngibuze imibuzo ye-Socratic, nginike iseluleko somsebenzi wasekhaya, hlola isinyathelo sami se-math, ngihlolise, yakha amakhadi okufunda, phikisana ngalesi sihloko, noma ngisize ngihlele ukubuyekeza.

entries.source: Use inspir to turn confusion into questions, examples, retrieval practice, writing feedback, debate, and a personal study plan.
entries.value: Sebenzisa inspir ukuze uguqule ukudideka kube imibuzo, izibonelo, ukuzijwayeza ukukhumbula, impendulo yokubhala, inkulumo-mpikiswano, nohlelo lomuntu siqu lokutadisha.

entries.source: Use inspir when the stuck point is specific.
entries.value: Sebenzisa inspir lapho iphuzu obambeke kulo licacile.

entries.source: Use inspir when you want a free public AI learning mode that can explain, question, quiz, coach homework, build flashcards, and adapt to the exact thing you are stuck on.
entries.value: Sebenzisa inspir lapho ufuna imodi yokufunda nge-AI yomphakathi yamahhala engachaza, ibuze, ikuhlolise, iqeqeshe umsebenzi wasekhaya, yakhe amakhadi okufunda, futhi ivumelane nalokho obambeke kukho ngqo.

entries.source: Use structured lessons when the path is known.
entries.value: Sebenzisa izifundo ezihlelekile lapho indlela yaziwa.

entries.source: Use the comparison below to pick the first public mode or guide.
entries.value: Sebenzisa ukuqhathanisa ngezansi ukuze ukhethe imodi yomphakathi yokuqala noma umhlahlandlela.

entries.source: Use the lesson library to learn the official sequence and practise core skills.
entries.value: Sebenzisa umtapo wezifundo ukuze ufunde ukulandelana okusemthethweni futhi uzijwayeze amakhono ayisisekelo.

entries.source: Use the right tool for the learning job.
Use Time Travel or Historical Person mode, while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented sources.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Time Travel noma imodi ye-Historical Person, kodwa ugcine ingxoxo ekhiqiziwe ihlukile emithonjeni ebhalwe phansi.

entries.source: Want the live learning version right now?
When should I use inspir first?
When to use
When to use {value1}, and when to open inspir.
entries.value: Isikhathi sokusebenzisa i-{value1}, nesikhathi sokuvula inspir.

entries.source: Why make comparison pages at all?
Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Yebo. Ukugeleza komsebenzi okuhle ukufunda isisekelo emthonjeni wesifundo othembekile, bese usebenzisa inspir ukubuza imibuzo elandelayo, ukuzijwayeza ukukhumbula, ukulungisa ukungaqondi, nokuhlela okuzobuyekezwa ngokulandelayo.
